files.oldContents:
# prettydiff

A tool for viewing diffs.

## Install

    npm install -g prettydiff

## Usage

    prettydiff

Run inside any git repository with working-tree changes.

## Features

- Side-by-side and unified views
- Syntax highlighting
- Inline comments you can copy out
- File tree navigation

## License

MIT
files.newContents:
# prettydiff

A CLI tool that opens a local web viewer for the working-tree diff of any git repo.
It supports unified and side-by-side views, syntax highlighting, and a sidebar file tree.

## Install

    bun install -g prettydiff
    # or: npm install -g prettydiff

## Usage

    prettydiff

Run inside any git repository with working-tree changes.

## Features

- Side-by-side and unified views
- Syntax highlighting
- Inline comments you can copy out
- File tree navigation

## License

MIT

diff --git a/src/utils/format.py b/src/utils/format.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..aaaaaaa
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/utils/format.py
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+"""Utility helpers for formatting diff output."""
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+from dataclasses import dataclass
+
+
+@dataclass(frozen=True)
+class LineRange:
+    start: int
+    end: int
+
+    def format(self) -> str:
+        if self.start == self.end:
+            return f"L{self.start}"
+        return f"L{self.start}-L{self.end}"

diff --git a/src/server/handler.go b/src/server/handler.go
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..bbbbbbb
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/server/handler.go
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+package server
+
+import (
+	"encoding/json"
+	"net/http"
+)
+
+type DiffResponse struct {
+	Branch string `json:"branch"`
+	Head   string `json:"head"`
+}
+
+func HandleDiff(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+	resp := DiffResponse{Branch: "main", Head: "abc1234"}
+	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
+	if err := json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(resp); err != nil {
+		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
+	}
+}

index a0a0a0a..b0b0b0b 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -8,10 +8,14 @@ jobs:
   test:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          fetch-depth: 0
       - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v1
         with:
           bun-version: latest
       - run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
-      - run: bun test
+      - run: bun run typecheck
+      - run: bun run lint
+      - run: bun test --coverage

diff --git a/migrations/0002_add_users.sql b/migrations/0002_add_users.sql
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..d0d0d0d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/migrations/0002_add_users.sql
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+CREATE TABLE users (
+    id          BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
+    email       TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
+    name        TEXT NOT NULL,
+    created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
+    updated_at  TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
+    deleted_at  TIMESTAMPTZ
+);
+
+CREATE INDEX idx_users_email_active ON users (email) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL;

diff --git a/Dockerfile b/Dockerfile
index e0e0e0e..f0f0f0f 100644
--- a/Dockerfile
+++ b/Dockerfile
@@ -1,11 +1,13 @@
-FROM node:20-alpine
+FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS builder
 WORKDIR /app
 COPY package.json ./
-RUN npm install
+COPY bun.lockb ./
+RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile
 COPY . .
-RUN npm run build
+RUN bun run build
 
+FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine
+WORKDIR /app
+COPY --from=builder /app/dist ./dist
 EXPOSE 3737
-CMD ["node", "dist/cli.js"]
+CMD ["bun", "dist/cli.js"]
files.oldContents:
FROM node:20-alpine
WORKDIR /app
COPY package.json ./
RUN npm install
COPY . .
RUN npm run build

EXPOSE 3737
CMD ["node", "dist/cli.js"]
files.newContents:
FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY package.json ./
COPY bun.lockb ./
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile
COPY . .
RUN bun run build

FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/dist ./dist
EXPOSE 3737
CMD ["bun", "dist/cli.js"]
